message:
test(scanner): expand truncate edge cases for full coverage

Add comprehensive tests for truncate function including:
- maxLen zero/negative returns empty
- maxLen 1-3 returns partial ellipsis
- UTF-8 boundary handling
- Multi-byte character truncation

Coverage: truncate 72.7% → 90.9%

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
